reviews.text:
Words cannot describe how incredible Malachi was throughout our entire elopement process. He was so easy to communicate with and made planning our day fun and stress free. He listened to every idea we had and made them come to life. He was extremely knowledgeable about our elopement location (Moab, Utah) and helped us plan out the perfect day. He managed to squeeze every possible location we wanted into our day and I'm still amazed at the number of locations he was able to capture. We wanted a simple, easy, stress free day and that is exactly what Malachi did for us. Our very anxious fur child couldn't even throw him off his game- he was so patient with her and captured the best photos of us with her. He was an absolute pleasure to be around and we loved getting to know him.

His photos literally speak for themselves as there are no words that do his photos justice. We are so incredibly happy with how our photos turned out and can't thank Malachi enough for the time and effort he put in to making our day so special. He captured the most insane photos and quite literally went to every length (jumping, running, climbing-you name it) to get the perfect photos of us. We will forever be grateful to Malachi for making this day our favorite day and one we will never forget.

We would, without a doubt, recommend Malachi for any photography needs you may have. He was truly amazing to work with and will meet every expectation you have -- so just book him already!!

Absolutely blown away by the photos we have received so far!  Malachi was a dream to work with and so thoughtful and lovely. Just an all-around amazing human being. So many people told me that their biggest wedding regret was not getting the right photographer. I'm so grateful we went with Malachi and Shell Creek Photography. We were truly blessed to have him as our photographer. Thank you for making our wedding day so special and creating long lasting memories for us.

Where do I start? We considered many different places and a few different photographers. This was a second marriage for both of us and we agreed we wanted to elope. And we wanted it to be different. Malachi is not only exceptionally skilled at the craft of photography, he is also extremely knowledgeable of various amazing places to elope. And if he isn’t, you’ll never know!! Then there’s his “Mary Poppins” truck and backpack, having everything you didn’t know you needed. I could go on and on about all his greatness, but that would make for a lot of reading. We highly recommend Malachi for your most memorable day!!!

Malachi was absolutely incredible - so much so that it is hard to put into words. Choosing him for our adventure elopement/micro wedding was so much more than simply choosing a photographer (though he is truly an awe-inspiringly talented one).

What first caught our eye was his photos (especially his nighttime star photos - a specialty of his), but it was ultimately his professionalism, personality, kindness, and overall expertise that made it clear to us that hiring him would create the wedding day of our dreams.

His photos are unreal and spectacular - so much so that we always doubted ours could possibly come out like the examples he sent us, and yet somehow he managed to make them even more mind blowing. From his unique star photos to sprawling landscapes to intimate moments and simple detail shots, he is a true master of his craft and you will not find a more talented photographer anywhere. In every setting, he has a vision and pursuing this allows him to create and capture the most incredible moments. Despite the rugged settings, he always makes you feel comfortable.

From our first zoom meeting with him to various planning meetings and emails leading up to our trip, his communications were clear and excellent. His website, client portal, and customized PDF guides are incredibly polished and helpful. Despite his busy travel schedule we were always able to pin him down for a quick zoom when we wanted to run through some details or questions. He provides a great balance of suggestions and guidance when you want it, and can be hands off when you prefer to drive the ship.

All of this is created very thoughtfully by his detailed process, in which we filled out a handful of fun and thoughtful surveys which helped both us and him to craft a vision for what we wanted our wedding day to look and feel like. After this stage is complete, he provides a deep and personalized list of location suggestions tailored specifically to you and your desires - from this we then selected our ideal ceremony site and a few other spots to do photos in later that day.

One of the biggest assets of having Malachi on your team is his deep and intimate knowledge of the outdoors, and specifically his expertise in finding amazing, unknown places for your ceremony and photos. On his free days he is always exploring, adding new spots (both hidden gems and more established landmarks) to his repertoire so that he can help you design the wedding day that is perfect for you. In our case we wanted to visit multiple different landscapes, on multiple days, and had to make them accessible for our grandparents while still feeling rugged and remote and private - Malachi delivered on this without breaking a sweat.

Truly though, his biggest asset is just being such a pleasure to be around. Malachi is kind, thoughtful, easygoing, and tons of fun. With an elopement or small group, this is absolutely critical. From the moment we first met up with him in Utah, it was like having a friend join us, not just someone we'd hired, and moments like driving to various spots together or having him join and capture our dinner party were 10x more enjoyable as he felt like a friend joining us in the fun, not a vendor we'd simply contracted for a service. By the end of the wedding day, all our family members had formed a bond with him. He is truly a rare and wonderful person.

One meaningful surprise was that in the few hours between our morning ceremony activities and reconvening in the afternoon, he managed to fully edit and produce a STUNNING first look album for us, which he surprised us with as a presentation on the TV during the happy hour before dinner. It brought tears to our eyes and was the perfect way to kick off the evening.

All in all - we recommend Malachi 100% without any reservations. Whether you are planning an adventure elopement, micro wedding, or something else entirely, he will make it a reality and absolutely exceed any and all expectations or desires. He is truly a pleasure to work with and a rare gem of a person.

I loved working with Malachi! His photography skills are incredible and he goes the extra mile by planning out the details, keeping you calm, and doing everything he can to make your day unforgettable!
